items.description: SVG hub-and-spoke layout with the blockus logo at center and eight partner logos orbiting on dashed radial lines.

items.name: integrations-04
items.title: Categorized integrations tabs
items.description: Tabbed integration browser organized by category (Payments, DevOps, Analytics, Productivity) with Connect actions per card.

items.name: integrations-05
items.title: Integration cards with description
items.description: Grid of integration cards each showing a framed logo, category pill, description, and Connect CTA.

items.name: integrations-06
items.title: Searchable integrations grid
items.description: Live-search input + tag filter chips that narrow a 16-item grid of integration logos in real time.

items.name: integrations-07
items.title: Dark integrations grid
items.description: Always-dark stone-950 canvas with a flush grid of 12 integration icons separated by hairline dividers.

items.name: integrations-08
items.title: Marketplace with featured integration
items.description: Marketplace layout: one featured integration with stats and an Install CTA above a compact grid of others.

items.name: integrations-09
items.title: Two-logo connector pairs
items.description: Stacked pairing cards — each shows two logos joined by a lightning connector, plus copy and bullet benefits.

items.name: integrations-10
items.title: Integration bento grid
items.description: Mixed-density bento layout: one large tile with description, single-logo tiles, and a wide multi-logo AI row.

items.name: integrations-11
items.title: Logo cloud with CTA
items.description: Centered logo cloud of 12 partner marks with grayscale-to-color hover, a headline, and dual CTA buttons.

items.name: integrations-12
items.title: Integration detail with setup steps
items.description: Split layout: sticky logo + metadata on the left, numbered timeline setup steps with inline code snippets on the right.

items.name: integrations-13
items.title: Popular integrations row + category chips
items.description: Horizontal pill list of integrations each tagged with a category chip, plus a static filter row of category chips above the fold.

items.name: integrations-14
items.title: Integration cards with enable toggle
items.description: Stacked list of integration cards with a native toggle switch per row so users can activate or deactivate connections inline.

items.name: integrations-15
items.title: Marquee logo scroll + copy
items.description: Full-bleed CSS marquee of 32 logo tiles with edge fade masks, centered headline, and an integration count beneath.

items.name: integrations-16
items.title: Integrations with category sidebar filter
items.description: Sticky sidebar of category buttons that client-side filters an 18-item integration card grid by category.

items.name: integrations-17
items.title: API / webhook style integration pairs
items.description: Each integration card splits into a description + event-chip column alongside a live code-snippet panel showing the webhook payload.

items.name: integrations-18
items.title: Featured integration spotlight + others grid
items.description: A wide spotlight card for the hero integration with highlights list sits beside a compact 3-column grid of secondary logos.

items.name: integrations-19
items.title: Integration stats header + logo grid
items.description: Four stat tiles (100+ apps, 40+ categories, uptime, latency) precede a dense 9-column logo grid with a +82 overflow tile.

items.name: integrations-20
items.title: Logo grid with Connect overlay on hover
items.description: Square logo tiles reveal a full-overlay + icon and Connect label on hover, keeping the resting state minimal.

items.name: integrations-21
items.title: Integration logos with connecting lines to center node
items.description: SVG radial diagram with 8 spoke logos connected by dashed lines to a center blockus node, paired with a connected-status list.

items.name: integrations-22
items.title: Compact integration pills row + description
items.description: Compact banner-style section: short brand copy on the left, a wrapping row of rounded-full logo+name pills on the right.

items.name: integrations-23
items.title: Request an integration CTA beside grid
items.description: Left-column request form (name + email + submit) paired with a 12-tile logo grid so discovery and requests coexist.

items.name: integrations-24
items.title: Hero headline + categorized integration grid
items.description: Full-width hero headline with CTA button above an 8-category grid where each card lists its top 3 integrations.
